title: Horse Craft
description: Horse Craft is a warm, retro‑inspired cozy game where you mix, match, and discover new horse breeds. Each breed comes with its own whimsical name and a cute journal entry, complete with notes about the horse’s personality and quirks. Meant to be more cozy rather than challenging, it’s a gentle world of exploration and discovery.
description_short: Horse Craft is a warm, retro‑inspired cozy game that's meant to be more calming than challenging. Mix, match, and discover new horse breeds. Each breed has a whimsical name and a cute journal entry that highlights its personality and quirks, creating a gentle world of exploration and discovery.
